HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

31class DomainHom3D : public Domain {
32 protected:
33 dcmplx epsilon;
34 dcmplx mu;
35
40 virtual int InitGrnFun();
41
42 public:
43 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
44 // Construction & lifetime
45 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
54 DomainHom3D(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex, dcmplx inEpsilon, dcmplx inMu,
55 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength);
56
66 DomainHom3D(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex, dcmplx inEpsilon, dcmplx inMu,
67 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength, bool parent);
68
70 ~DomainHom3D();
71
72 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
73 // Formulation & materials
74 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
80 int InitFormulation(dcmplx inVacWavelength);
81
87 virtual dcmplx Epsilon(rvec pos);
88
94 virtual dcmplx Mu(rvec pos);
95
99 virtual bool IsLayered() { return false; }
100
101 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
102 // Layered‑media helpers
103 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
108 virtual GreenF* GetGrnFunLayeredFields() const { return nullptr; }
109
114 virtual void newGrnFunLayered(std::vector<rvec> &posvec);
115
116 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
117 // Cross‑sections (post‑processing)
118 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
124 virtual std::vector<double> scatteringCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
125
132 virtual double absorptionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
133
140 virtual double extinctionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
141
142 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
143 // Incident field factories
144 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
152 virtual int AddPlaneWave(dcmplx wavelength, rvec propagationDirection,
153 cvec polarization);
154
161 virtual int AddDipole(rvec position, cvec polarization);
162
172 virtual int AddGaussian(double wavelength, double waist, rvec focal_point,
173 rvec propagationdirection, cvec polarization);
174};

Domain.h
Abstract simulation domain class for SIE scattering.

3D scalar/dyadic Green's function in a homogeneous background.
